page_header.label: SECURITY
page_header.title: Security Model
page_header.description: How ZKIRA protects your funds and privacy through battle-tested cryptography and self-custody architecture.

items.title: ECDH Key Exchange
items.description: Stealth addresses are derived using Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman key exchange. Sender's ephemeral key + receiver's view key = shared secret for one-time address generation.

items.title: SHA-256 Claim Verification
items.description: Claim secrets are verified on-chain using SHA-256 hashing. Only the hash is stored in escrow, preventing secret exposure while ensuring only valid claimants can unlock funds.

items.title: Ed25519 Signatures
items.description: All transactions use Solana's native Ed25519 signature scheme. Fast, secure, and deterministic signatures ensure transaction integrity without requiring trust in third parties.

sections.label: SELF-CUSTODY
sections.title: Your Keys, Your Funds
sections.subtitle: ZKIRA Pay operates as a non-custodial system. We never hold, touch, or have access to your private keys or funds.

items.title: Never Hold Private Keys
items.description: ZKIRA Pay smart contracts interact only with public addresses and signed transactions. Your private keys remain exclusively in your wallet, never transmitted or stored by our systems.

items.title: Deterministic Contracts
items.description: All escrow operations are governed by deterministic smart contracts. No human intervention, no admin overrides, no special privileges—just code executing exactly as programmed.

items.title: PDA-Based Escrow Accounts
items.description: Program Derived Addresses (PDAs) create deterministic escrow accounts. No private keys exist for these accounts—only the program can control them, eliminating human error or malicious access.

items.title: Time-Locked with Auto-Refund
items.description: Every escrow has a configurable expiry time. If unclaimed, funds automatically become refundable to the sender. No funds can ever be permanently lost or stuck in the system.

items.title: RESOLVED
items.description:
Claimed by recipient
or refunded to sender

sections.label: OPEN SOURCE
sections.title: Verify Everything
sections.subtitle: True security requires transparency. Every line of ZKIRA Pay code is open source and auditable by anyone.

items.title: All Code Public on GitHub
items.description: Every smart contract, API endpoint, and frontend component is available on GitHub. No hidden code, no proprietary algorithms, no secret backdoors.

items.title: Verifiable Builds
items.description: Anchor programs are built deterministically. Anyone can verify that the deployed bytecode matches the published source code—no trust required.

sections.label: SECURITY DISCLOSURE
sections.title: Report Vulnerabilities
sections.subtitle: Security researchers and ethical hackers are essential to blockchain security. We welcome responsible disclosure of potential vulnerabilities.

paragraphs: Contact our security team at security@zkira.xyz. We follow responsible disclosure practices and will work with you to understand and address any security concerns.

items.title: REPORT
items.description: Send details to security@zkira.xyz with proof-of-concept

items.title: ACKNOWLEDGE
items.description: We confirm receipt and begin investigation within 48 hours

items.title: RESOLVE
items.description: Fix issued, coordinated disclosure, recognition provided

sections.title: Verify our claims
sections.description: Don't take our word for it. Examine our code, run your own tests, and verify every security claim we make.
